posts_in_window.text: Gear Advice 1201 vs FB ??? Hi everyone, I'm considering switching from my 1201 to a fireball but can't decide the size. I'm mainly doing pumping foil and some wing and surf foil, ideally something I could use in small waves and light wind would be great ! I can't decide the size, any advice ? Thank you
posts_in_window.reactions_summary: count not visible in captured modal

comments.name: Liam Walton
comments.text: 1250. Is ya ticket, less area at the tips so it doesn't kick you around in turbulent water as much.. pumps happy as, the area difference isn't that noticeable

comments.name: Tim VR
comments.text: 1250, will work perfectly for that. Just use it on a tiny stab, I use the skinny 25 and it will turn and pump really well. I own and use the Fireball 1070, 1160, 1250, 1350 and 1500

comments.name: Mickie Williams
comments.text: I just got a 1250 FB love it And yes tiny stab

comments.name: Peter J Lataille
comments.text: Oh man! FB 1250 for sure over the AP 1201. Faster, turns easier, better glide, better pumping.

product_intel: Strong recommendation cluster for Fireball 1250 as upgrade from AP1201 for pump/wing/small-wave crossover.
Repeated advice to pair FB1250 with smaller rear stabilizers (tiny stab / Skinny 25) for better turning and pump feel.
Fireball line breadth validation from active rider (1070/1160/1250/1350/1500 ownership) indicates deep quiver adoption.
